class.name: Component
class.brief_description: Base class for components that can be attached to nodes.
class.description: [Component] is a base class for implementing the component pattern in Godot. It can be used to encapsulate data and behavior that is attached to a parent node. Subclasses should override the [method get_component] virtual method to return a [Dictionary] describing the component's data.

method.name: get_component
method.description: Override this method to return a [Dictionary] containing the component's data. The returned dictionary can be used by other systems to query the component's state.
